case_title: TOOKER & ANTZ VS LAW OFFICES OF PATRICK J. MANSHARDT @ ONE BUNKER-

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF PATRICK J. MANSHARDT  @ ONE BUNKER-
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-28-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOOKER & ANTZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF PATRICK J. MANSHARDT  @ ONE BUNKER- $1,828.40 PRINCIPAL, $107.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,935.40, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE DATED NOV 7, 2005 REQUESTING COPY OF JUDGMENT-MAILED.
